description: E4 skipped after E2 (4-node stewardship hub-wiring) + E3 (Hercule solo-node commission with 3-card frontmatter wiring) jointly delivered a substantive wave. Candidates surveyed for E4: (a) Kibito Kai's Attendant BT3-042 — canonically stewardship-coded per the hub body but no Kibito solo node exists yet AND cards don't carry related_hubs (only layer-nodes do per the brief), so card-direct stewardship wiring is structurally unavailable; (b) Videl solo node — 2 corpus prints meets threshold-relaxed-precedent but Mr. Nodeley budget already spent on Hercule this pass (one-per-invocation rule); Videl is a clean follow-up commission for the next wave; (c) generic unwired-pair from edgelord_queue — would dilute the wave by adding a thin third edge after two strong moves landed. Quality of one good edge > quantity of weak edges. Refusal-with-receipts is first-class per Edgelord doctrine.
